text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At my instruction, Tosen Jordan is making nail
tips inspired by other runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her perceptiveness improves, but she also
realizes she isn't receiving as much attention as
those around her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if trying to shake off her unease, she runs with
all her might. A reporter who noticed her during
the Hopeful Stakes comes for an interview.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But just then, Tosen Jordan finds herself
overcome by agonizing pain... Her toenail has
split.
